Package nonprofitbookkeeping.core

Class ApplicationContextImpl

public class ApplicationContextImpl extends Object implements ApplicationContext

  • Constructor Details

    • ApplicationContextImpl

      public ApplicationContextImpl(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage, javafx.scene.control.MenuBar menuBar, ReportService reportService, ReportConfigurationService reportConfigurationService, InventoryService inventoryService, DocumentStorageService documentStorageService, FundAccountingService fundAccountingService)
      Constructs an ApplicationContextImpl.
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - The primary stage of the application.
      menuBar - The menu bar of the application.
      reportService - The report service.
      budgetService - The budget service.
      reportConfigurationService - The report configuration service.
      inventoryService - The inventory service.
      documentStorageService - The document storage service.
      fundAccountingService - The fund accounting service.
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if primaryStage or menuBar is null.

    • ApplicationContextImpl

      public ApplicationContextImpl(javafx.stage.Stage primaryStage, ReportService reportService, ReportConfigurationService reportConfigurationService, InventoryService inventoryService, DocumentStorageService documentStorageService, FundAccountingService fundAccountingService)
      Constructs an ApplicationContextImpl with default instances for services and UI components.
      Parameters:
      primaryStage - The primary stage of the application.
      reportService - The report service.
      budgetService - The budget service.
      reportConfigurationService - The report configuration service.
      inventoryService - The inventory service.
      documentStorageService - The document storage service.
      fundAccountingService - The fund accounting service.
